title: XPeng Could Surprise With Q4 2021 Earnings and Technological Advancements
text: XPeng reported Q4 2021 earnings on March 28, 2022, with a loss of $202 million, or 22 cents on an adjusted per-share basis, on revenue of $1.34 billion. This significantly exceeded Wall Street expectations, as seven analysts polled by FactSet had projected an adjusted loss of 33 cents per share, on average. The company reported record deliveries in Q4 with 41,751 units, representing +222% year-over-year growth, exceeding prior guidance. XPeng's fourth-quarter loss was narrower than Wall Street expected as pricing power helped cushion the impact from supply chain challenges and rising costs. The strong Q4 results demonstrated XPeng's ability to achieve scale and revenue growth despite macro headwinds.
